title: System for wood plastic composite (wpc) lamination on any kind of metal
abstract: This invention is about a lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and consisting of driver stand (1), centering group (2), metal profile or panel (3), driver reel group (4), heat transfer tube (5), wpc lamination form (6), extruder machine (7), support stand (8), driver switchboard (9) sections.
claims: Claims This invention is about a lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and it consists of driver stand (1), centering group (2) , metal profile or panel (3), driver reel group (4), heat transfer tube (5), wpc lamination form (6), extruder machine (7), support stand (8), driver switchboard (9) sections. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the driver stand (1) which feeds metal profile or panel to the system. 3. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the centering group (2) which ensures proper and accurate centering of metal profile or panel. 4. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the metal profile or panel (3) which will be laminated with wpc. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the driver reel group (4) which passes the metal profile or panel through heat transfer tube and routes it towards wpc lamination form. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the heat transfer tube (5) which ensures preheating of metal profile or panel. 7. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the wpc lamination form (6) which ensures lamination of metal profile or panel to the system. 8. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the extruder machine (7) which renders WPC raw material fluid allowing injection to wpc lamination form. 9. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the support stand (8) which ensures progress of metal profile or panel extracted from the extruder machine by cooling down. 10. Defined in Claim 1, it is about the lamination system which locks wood plastic composite (WPC) on any kind of metal and contains the driver switchboard (9) which ensures control of the driver.
